top_signals.title: UK's information commissioner resigns over ‘inappropriate humour’
top_signals.summary: Writing on LinkedIn, Edwards said that while he has not agreed with how the investigation into him has been conducted, he has come to accept that his position “has become untenable.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Miyagi volunteer probation officers seek sustainable rehabilitation system
top_signals.summary: Japan is relying heavily on volunteer probation officers to support rehabilitation, but aging, shortages and safety fears are putting growing strain on the system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
